defaultStrategy: Build web first, ship a WebView app immediately, then graduate selected screens to native React Native.

phases.purpose: Fast installable app shell that points at the generated web product.
Native screen scaffold using the same screen manifest and shared product contract.
Shared app metadata, screen manifest, route constants, and token snapshot for web/mobile targets.
Convert validated web screens into native screens one at a time.
Future generators consume product/SCREEN_MANIFEST.json plus mobile/packages/shared instead of re-reading raw screenshots.
